creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Wed Nov  6 13:34:58 2013
New Revision: 332991
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/332991

Log:
  games/py-mnemosyne: update to 2.2.1
  
  - Update to 2.2.1
  - use python auto plist
  - Drop maintainership
  
  PR:		ports/183707
  Submitted by:	Marek <marekrud gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/games/py-mnemosyne/Makefile
  head/games/py-mnemosyne/distinfo
  head/games/py-mnemosyne/pkg-plist

Modified: head/games/py-mnemosyne/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/games/py-mnemosyne/Makefile	Wed Nov  6 13:19:12 2013	(r332990)
+++ head/games/py-mnemosyne/Makefile	Wed Nov  6 13:34:58 2013	(r332991)
@@ -2,25 +2,27 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	mnemosyne
-PORTVERSION=	2.2a
-PORTREVISION=	2
+PORTVERSION=	2.2.1
+PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	games python
-MASTER_SITES=	SF/mnemosyne-proj/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}-2.2
+MASTER_SITES=	SF/mnemosyne-proj/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}-${DISTVERSION}
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 DISTNAME=	Mnemosyne-${DISTVERSION}
 
-MAINTAINER=	marekrud@gmail.com
+MAINTAINER=	ports@freebsd.org
 COMMENT=	Flash-card tool which optimises your learning process
 
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}qt4>=4.5:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-qt4 \
-		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}matplotlib>=1.1.1:${PORTSDIR}/math/py-matplotlib \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}matplotlib>=1.2.0:${PORTSDIR}/math/py-matplotlib \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}cherrypy>=3.2:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-cherrypy
 
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
+USES=		desktop-file-utils
+PYDISTUTILS_AUTOPLIST=	yes
 PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME=	Mnemosyne
-
 NO_STAGE=	yes
+
 post-install:
 	@cd ${WRKSRC}/mo && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${PREFIX}/share/locale
 	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${PORTNAME}.desktop ${PREFIX}/share/applications

Modified: head/games/py-mnemosyne/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/games/py-mnemosyne/distinfo	Wed Nov  6 13:19:12 2013	(r332990)
+++ head/games/py-mnemosyne/distinfo	Wed Nov  6 13:34:58 2013	(r332991)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (Mnemosyne-2.2a.tar.gz) = b06074645dd6ba6a4f9d95c299e5efcfe8dca018965fd6b151fe134101cabd83
-SIZE (Mnemosyne-2.2a.tar.gz) = 1214134
+SHA256 (Mnemosyne-2.2.1.tar.gz) = 7f5dd06a879b9ab059592355412182ee286e78e124aa25d588cacf9e4ab7c423
+SIZE (Mnemosyne-2.2.1.tar.gz) = 1252668

==============================================================================
--- head/games/py-mnemosyne/pkg-plist	Wed Nov  6 13:19:12 2013	(r332990)
+++ head/games/py-mnemosyne/pkg-plist	Wed Nov  6 13:34:58 2013	(r332991)
@@ -1,6 +1,3 @@
-bin/mnemosyne
-bin/mnemosyne-webserver
-%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%
 share/applications/mnemosyne.desktop
 share/icons/mnemosyne.png
 share/locale/cs/LC_MESSAGES/mnemosyne.mo
@@ -10,6 +7,7 @@ share/locale/eo/LC_MESSAGES/mnemosyne.mo
 share/locale/es/LC_MESSAGES/mnemosyne.mo
 share/locale/fa/LC_MESSAGES/mnemosyne.mo
 share/locale/fr/LC_MESSAGES/mnemosyne.mo
+share/locale/gl/LC_MESSAGES/mnemosyne.mo
 share/locale/he/LC_MESSAGES/mnemosyne.mo
 share/locale/hr/LC_MESSAGES/mnemosyne.mo
 share/locale/hu/LC_MESSAGES/mnemosyne.mo
